name: Multiple Login Failures from Default Accounts
notes: This rule detects multiple login failures from default accounts.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when the event matches username MATCHES '(Järjestelmänvalvoja|Rendszergazda|Администратор|Administrateur|Administrador|Administratör|Administrator|guest|DefaultAccount)' AQL filter query
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Login Failures from Default Accounts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when the event matches username MATCHES '(Järjestelmänvalvoja|Rendszergazda|Администратор|Administrateur|Administrador|Administratör|Administrator|guest|DefaultAccount)' AQL filter query
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Login Failures from Default Accounts
Event description: This rule detects multiple login failures from default accounts.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using ProcessName (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
